entry.title: day-1
entry.content:
【第一部分：意外的发现】
I once visited an antique shop in a county near San Francisco. The owner, a bachelor with a long beard, was a chemist by profession but a collector by nature. As I entered, a strange sight caught my eye: a brilliant blue globe sitting on a glass yard table. He explained that it showed the orbit and axis of the Earth. The shop was plain but filled with stuff: a cord of fairy lights, a torch, and a specimen of a brown patch butterfly. The owner was frank with me; he said some items were mere copies, but this globe was genuine.
【第二部分：实验室的挑战】
I tried to grasp the details, but he warned me it was high-risk to touch. Suddenly, a pot on his stove, filled with vinegar and pepper, began to boil over. He had to overtake the distance to the kitchen to tackle the mess. In his absence, I noticed the globe was compatible with a small stripe on the base. It was obvious he would cherish such a monument. Scientific progress is like a stream; it flows as follows. A layer of acid can dissolve poison, which is particularly useful for nursing animals. The preparation was worthy of a doctoral study. The lab was watertight to avoid any hazard. The team had to bury their fears and stand in for each other.
【第三部分：社会与职场】
One night, a rumour spread that petrol prices would soar, increasing their expense sum. They had to get down to business to find a new tune. In today’s industry, global employment trends change accordingly. A manufacturer might go bankrupt if they impose negative rules. An agency might accuse a manager of contempt if they show prejudice against a nationality. In no case should we disable the potential of a temporary worker. A campaigner decided to initiate a webcast to stimulate a consensus. She had the insight to define a self-sufficient workplace.
【第四部分：尾声与细节】
She spoke with sympathy for those with loan debts. Whereas some kneel to profit, she stood for the quota of fairness. To insure success, she had to lay out a plan to assist those in dark times. By and by, more people would show up. The coverage of her success was like a concert of electronic music. Outside, the weather was earthy. They decided to dump waste in a hole in the northwest. After work, they went to a motel to eat a steak and think up ideas. The thermometer showed it was cold, but their presence made the room fair.
【补充遗漏的零散词汇：】
Even a stranger could see they were alike. They wore loose clothes to keep from heat. One odd pose behind the scenes could exhibit a pose. The vocabulary they used was scientific. In accordance with the charter, the twentieth appointment was set. She felt grateful to escape injury. The feather on her hat was intimate with the wind. The drag of the appointment made her asleep, but she remained conscious. To weaken the stripe, they used a patch. Or else, they would drag the preparation at the latest.

The above articles were written by Gemini

mention the words and phrase are as follows:
petrol,soar,prejudice,polish,wheel,accordingly,insure,particular,as follows,loose,high-risk,erect,cover for,pepper,axis,intimate,by and by,attract,agency,cord,bachelor,accuse,a brown patch,boil over,in no case,odd,nursing,pose,specimen,behind the scenes,show up,plain,overtake,beard,twentieth,compatible,carry off,in store,go through,hole,exhibit,san francisco,earthy,dump,obvious,industry,stream,antique,yard,impose,tackle,webcast,glass,cherish,fair,grasp,initiate,stuff,concert,preparation,torch,stranger,keep from,layer,by nature,rumour,accordance,get down to business,charter,mere,coverage,contempt,negative,harbour,assist,nationality,scientific,temporary,electronic music,feather,drag,vocabulary,define,acid,escape injury,bankrupt,self-sufficient,county,manufacturer,asleep,frank,stand in,suit,loan,appointment,think up,sympathy,international concern,tune,stimulate,presence,consensus,certainly,chemistry,accent,stripe,vinegar,pregnant,a strange sight,monument,poison,steak,grateful,orbit,treat,dissolve,patch,doctoral,at the latest,lay out,dark,watertight,fairy,oral,hazard,worthy,weaken,motel,campaigner,chemist,whereas,or else,kneel,quota,expense,sum,insight,disable,bury,northwest,show off,draw on,genuine,thermometer,set about,introduction,disapprove,global employment trends,alike,concrete,brilliant blue,conscious

entry.title: 自我与关系边界
entry.content:
当我们准备建立一个亲密关系的时候，我们究竟在追求什么？

1+1=1 1+1=0 1+1=2
